Our Program

Important Update

The 2025–2026 season begins Monday, September 22. Volunteers should arrive 15 minutes early for orientation on opening night.

2025–2026 Schedule

Monday Sessions: 6:00 PM – 7:30 PM

September

September 22, September 29

October

October 6, October 13, October 20, October 27

November 3, November 10, November 17, November 24

December 1, December 8, December 15

March

  • March 18 — 5:30 PM – 9:00 PM
  • March 20 — 5:30 PM – 9:00 PM
  • March 21 (SHOW DAY) — 5:30 PM (Stars call time)
